All Classes

Class Description
AbstractApplicationScope
ApplicationScope for the main and test codebases.
AbstractArrayValidator<S,​A,​E>
Extensible implementation of ExtensibleArrayValidator.
AbstractArrayValidatorNoOp<S,​A,​E>
An ExtensibleArrayValidator that does nothing.
AbstractArrayVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleArrayValidator<V,​A,​E>,​A,​E>
An implementation of ExtensibleArrayVerifier.
AbstractArrayVerifierNoOp<S,​A,​E>
An ExtensibleArrayVerifier that does nothing.
AbstractBooleanValidator<S>
Extensible implementation of ExtensibleBooleanValidator.
AbstractBooleanVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleBooleanValidator<V>>
An implementation of ExtensibleBooleanVerifier.
AbstractCollectionValidator<S,​C extends Collection<E>,​E>
Extensible implementation of ExtensibleCollectionValidator.
AbstractComparableValidator<S,​T extends Comparable<? super T>>
An implementation of ExtensibleComparableValidator.
AbstractComparableValidatorNoOp<S,​T extends Comparable<? super T>>
A ExtensibleComparableValidator that does nothing.
AbstractComparableVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleComparableValidator<V,​T>,​T extends Comparable<? super T>>
Extensible implementation of ExtensibleComparableVerifier.
AbstractComparableVerifierNoOp<S,​T extends Comparable<? super T>>
A ExtensibleComparableVerifier that does nothing.
AbstractDoubleValidator<S>
Extensible implementation of ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator for doubles.
AbstractFloatingPointValidatorNoOp<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
An ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator that does nothing.
AbstractFloatingPointVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator<V,​T>,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
Default implementation of ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier.
AbstractFloatingPointVerifierNoOp<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
An ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier that does nothing.
AbstractFloatValidator<S>
Extensible implementation of ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator for floats.
AbstractGlobalConfiguration
Base class for GlobalConfigurable instances.
AbstractIntegerValidator<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
Extensible implementation of ExtensibleIntegerValidator.
AbstractNumberValidator<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
Default implementation of ExtensibleNumberValidator.
AbstractNumberValidatorNoOp<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
An ExtensibleNumberValidator that does nothing.
AbstractNumberVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleNumberValidator<V,​T>,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
Default implementation of ExtensibleNumberVerifier.
AbstractNumberVerifierNoOp<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
An ExtensibleNumberVerifier that does nothing.
AbstractObjectValidator<S,​T>
Default implementation of ExtensibleObjectValidator.
AbstractObjectValidatorNoOp<S,​T>
An ExtensibleObjectValidator that does nothing.
AbstractObjectVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleObjectValidator<V,​T>,​T>
Default implementation of ExtensibleObjectVerifier.
AbstractObjectVerifierNoOp<S,​T>
An ExtensibleObjectVerifier that does nothing.
AbstractPrimitiveNumberValidatorNoOp<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
An ExtensiblePrimitiveNumberValidator that does nothing.
AbstractPrimitiveNumberVerifierNoOp<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
An ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier that does nothing.
ApiGenerator
Generates Requirements and DefaultRequirements endpoints.
ApplicationScope
The configuration of an application.
Arrays
Array helper functions.
ArrayValidator<A,​E>
Validates the requirements of an array of elements.
ArrayValidatorImpl<A,​E>
Default implementation of ArrayValidator.
ArrayValidatorNoOp<A,​E>
An ArrayValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
ArrayVerifier<A,​E>
Verifies the requirements of an array.
ArrayVerifierImpl<A,​E>
Default implementation of ArrayVerifier.
ArrayVerifierNoOp<A,​E>
An ArrayVerifier that does nothing.
BigDecimalPrecisionValidator
Validates the requirements of a BigDecimal.precision().
BigDecimalPrecisionValidatorImpl
Default implementation of BigDecimalPrecisionValidator.
BigDecimalPrecisionValidatorNoOp
A BigDecimalPrecisionValidator that does nothing.
BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier
Verifies the requirements of a BigDecimal.precision().
BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierImpl
Default implementation of BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier.
BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierNoOp
A BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier that does nothing.
BigDecimalScaleValidatorImpl
An implementation of PrimitiveNumberValidator for a BigDecimal's scale.
BigDecimalScaleVerifierImpl
An implementation of PrimitiveNumberVerifier for a BigDecimal's scale.
BigDecimalValidator
Validates the requirements of a BigDecimal value.
BigDecimalValidatorImpl
Default implementation of BigDecimalValidator.
BigDecimalValidatorNoOp
A BigDecimalValidator that does nothing.
BigDecimalVerifier
Verifies the requirements of a BigDecimal value.
BigDecimalVerifierImpl
Default implementation of BigDecimalVerifier.
BigDecimalVerifierNoOp
A BigDecimalVerifier that does nothing.
BooleanValidator
Validates the requirements of a boolean value.
BooleanValidatorImpl
Default implementation of BooleanValidator.
BooleanValidatorNoOp
A BooleanValidator that does nothing.
BooleanVerifier
Verifies the requirements of a boolean value.
BooleanVerifierImpl
Default implementation of BooleanVerifier.
BooleanVerifierNoOp
A BooleanVerifier that does nothing.
ClassValidator<T>
Validates the requirements of a Class value.
ClassValidatorImpl<T>
Default implementation of ClassValidator.
ClassValidatorNoOp<T>

ClassVerifier<T>
Verifies the requirements of a Class value.
ClassVerifierImpl<T>

ClassVerifierNoOp<T>
A ClassVerifier that does nothing.
CollectionValidator<C extends Collection<E>,​E>
Validates the requirements of a Collection.

Default implementation of CollectionValidator.
CollectionValidatorNoOp<C extends Collection<E>,​E>
A CollectionValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
CollectionVerifier<C extends Collection<E>,​E>
Verifies the requirements of a Collection.
CollectionVerifierImpl<C extends Collection<E>,​E>
An implementation of CollectionVerifier.
CollectionVerifierNoOp<C extends Collection<E>,​E>
A CollectionVerifier that does nothing.
ColorTest
Outputs all 8-bit color combinations.
ComparableValidator<T extends Comparable<? super T>>
Validates the requirements of a Comparable.
ComparableValidatorImpl<T extends Comparable<? super T>>
Default implementation of ComparableValidator.
ComparableValidatorNoOp<T extends Comparable<? super T>>
A ComparableValidator that does nothing.
ComparableVerifier<T extends Comparable<? super T>>
Verifies the requirements of a Comparable.
ComparableVerifierImpl<T extends Comparable<? super T>>
Default implementation of ComparableVerifier.
ComparableVerifierNoOp<T extends Comparable<? super T>>
A ComparableVerifier that does nothing.
Configuration
Configures the behavior of a single verifier.
ContextGenerator
Returns the difference between two values as an exception context.
ContextLine
A line item in an exception context.
DefaultGuavaRequirements
Default implementation of GuavaRequirements.
DefaultJavaRequirements
Default implementation of JavaRequirements.
DefaultJvmScope
The default implementation of JvmScope.
DefaultRequirements
Verifies API requirements using the default configuration.
DefaultThreadConfiguration
Configures the behavior of all verifiers invoked by the current thread.
DiffConstants
Constants used for generating diffs.
DiffGenerator
Generates a diff of two Strings.
DiffResult
The result of calculating the difference between two strings.
DiffWriter
Generates the String representation of a diff between actual and expected values.
DoubleValidatorImpl
Default implementation of FloatingPointValidator<Double>.
DoubleVerifierImpl
Default implementation of FloatingPointVerifier<Double>.
EqualDelta<T>
Describes the add-delta between original and revised texts.
ExceptionOptimizer
Optimizes the exceptions thrown by the library.
Exceptions
Exception helper functions.
ExtensibleArrayValidator<S,​A,​E>
Validates the requirements of an array of elements but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a ArrayValidator.
ExtensibleArrayVerifier<S,​A,​E>
Verifies the requirements of an array of elements but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a ArrayVerifier.
ExtensibleBooleanValidator<S>
Validates the requirements of a boolean value but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a BooleanValidator.
ExtensibleBooleanVerifier<S>
Verifies the requirements of a boolean value but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a BooleanVerifier.
ExtensibleCollectionValidator<S,​C extends Collection<E>,​E>
Validates the requirements of a collection of elements but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a CollectionValidator.
ExtensibleCollectionVerifier<S,​C,​E>
Verifies the requirements of a collection of elements but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a CollectionVerifier.
ExtensibleComparableValidator<S,​T extends Comparable<? super T>>
Validates the requirements of a value that extends Comparable but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a ComparableValidator.
ExtensibleComparableVerifier<S,​T extends Comparable<? super T>>
Verifies the requirements of a value that extends Comparable but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a ComparableVerifier.
ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
Validates the requirements of a floating-point value but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a FloatingPointValidator.
ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
Verifies the requirements of a floating-point value but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a FloatingPointVerifier.
ExtensibleIntegerValidator<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
Validates the requirements of an integer value but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a IntegerValidator.
ExtensibleIntegerVerifier<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
Verifies the requirements of an integer value but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a IntegerVerifier.
ExtensibleNumberValidator<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
Validates the requirements of a value that extends Number but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a NumberValidator.
ExtensibleNumberVerifier<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
Verifies the requirements of a value that extends Number but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a NumberVerifier.
ExtensibleObjectValidator<S,​T>
Validates the requirements of an Object.
ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,​T>
Verifies the requirements of a value that extends Object but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be an ObjectVerifier.
ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator<S,​T>
Validates the requirements of a value that extends a primitive type (e.g.
ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier<S,​T>
Verifies the requirements of a value that extends a primitive type (e.g.
FloatingPointValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
Validates the requirements of a floating-point number.
FloatingPointValidatorNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
A FloatingPointValidator that does nothing.
FloatingPointVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
Verifies the requirements of a floating-point number.
FloatingPointVerifierNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
A FloatingPointVerifier that does nothing.
FloatValidatorImpl
Default implementation of FloatingPointValidator<Float>.
FloatVerifierImpl
Default implementation of FloatingPointVerifier<Float>.
GenerateApiMojo
Generates the Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.
GlobalConfiguration
The global configuration inherited by all verifiers.
GlobalRequirements
The global configuration inherited by all verifiers.
GuavaRequirements
Verifies the requirements types from of the Guava library API.
GuavaSecrets
A mechanism for calling package-private methods in another package without using reflection.
HelpMojo
Display help information on maven_plugin.
Call mvn requirements:help -Ddetail=true -Dgoal=<goal-name> to display parameter details.
IllegalArgumentExceptionWrapper
Optimizes exceptions thrown by the library.
InetAddressValidator
Validates the requirements of an IP address or hostname.
InetAddressValidatorImpl
Default implementation of InetAddressValidator.
InetAddressValidatorNoOp
An InetAddressValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
InetAddressVerifier
Verifies the requirements of an IP address or hostname.
InetAddressVerifierImpl
Default implementation of InetAddressVerifier.
InetAddressVerifierNoOp
An InetAddressVerifier that does nothing.
IntegerValidator<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
Validates the requirements of an integer number.
IntegerValidatorImpl
Default implementation of IntegerValidator<Integer>.
IntegerValidatorNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
An IntegerValidator that does nothing.
IntegerVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
Verifies the requirements of an integer number.
IntegerVerifierImpl
Default implementation of IntegerVerifier<Integer>.
IntegerVerifierNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
An IntegerVerifier that does nothing.
IOExceptionWrapper
Optimizes exceptions thrown by the library.
JavaRequirements
Verifies the requirements of types from the Java core API.
JavaSecrets
A mechanism for calling package-private methods in another package without using reflection.
JvmScope
The JVM configuration.

List helper functions.

Validates the requirements of a List.

ListValidatorNoOp<L extends List<E>,​E>

Verifies the requirements of a list.
ListVerifierImpl<L extends List<E>,​E>
An implementation of ListVerifier.
ListVerifierNoOp<L extends List<E>,​E>
A ListVerifier that does nothing.
LongValidatorImpl
Default implementation of IntegerValidator<Long>.
LongVerifierImpl
Default implementation of IntegerVerifier<Long>.

ApplicationScope for the main codebase.
MainConfiguration
Configures the behavior of a single verifier.
MainGlobalConfiguration
Default global configuration.

OperatingSystem.Architecture
The architecture of an operating system.
OperatingSystem.Type
Operating system types.
OperatingSystem.Version
The version number of an operating system.
OptimizedException
Indicates that an exception has been optimized for use with this library.
OptimizeExceptionsMojo
Optimizes the exceptions thrown by the library, such as evaluating stack traces are lazily.

Sets
Set helper functions.
SharedSecrets
A mechanism for calling package-private methods in another package without using reflection.
SizeValidator
Validates the requirements of the size of a collection.
SizeValidatorImpl
Default implementation of a SizeValidator.
SizeValidatorNoOp
A SizeValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
SizeVerifier
Verifies the requirements of the size of a collection.
SizeVerifierImpl
Default implementation of a SizeVerifier.
SizeVerifierNoOp
A SizeVerifier that does nothing.
Strings
String helper functions.
StringValidator
Validates the requirements of a String.
StringValidatorImpl
Default implementation of StringValidator.
StringValidatorNoOp
A StringValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
StringVerifier
Verifies the requirements of a String.
StringVerifierImpl
Default implementation of StringVerifier.
StringVerifierNoOp
A StringVerifier that does nothing.
Terminal
The terminal associated with the JVM.
TerminalEncoding
The ANSI escape codes supported by the terminal.
TextOnly
A diff writer that does not use ANSI escape codes.
ThreadConfiguration
Configures the behavior of all verifiers invoked by the current thread.
ThreadRequirements
Configures the behavior of all verifiers invoked by the current thread.
UnpackMojo
Unpacks native binaries used by this library.
UriValidator
Validates the requirements of a URI.
UriValidatorImpl
Default implementation of UriValidator.
UriValidatorNoOp
A UriValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
UriVerifier
Verifies the requirements of a URI.
UriVerifierImpl
Default implementation of UriVerifier.
UriVerifierNoOp
A UriVerifier that does nothing.
UrlValidator
Validates the requirements of a URL.
UrlValidatorImpl
Default implementation of UrlValidator.
UrlValidatorNoOp
A UrlValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
UrlVerifier
Verifies the requirements of a URL.
UrlVerifierImpl
Default implementation of UrlVerifier.
UrlVerifierNoOp
A UrlVerifier that does nothing.
ValidationFailure
A failed validation.
ValidationFailureImpl
Default implementation of ValidationFailure.
Verifiers
Verifier helper functions.
WordWithDeltas
A word with the list of associated deltas.
Writer16Colors
A terminal that supports 16 colors.
Writer16MillionColors
A terminal that supports 16 million colors.
Writer256Colors
A terminal that supports a 256 color palette.
Writer8Colors
A terminal that supports an 8 colors.
